summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Beauty Parlour iteration 3 features: Feature cards without icons, dynamic navbar logo, admin password reset, customer management CRUD, phone-only account recovery, and contact form enquiries system. All backend (20/20) and frontend tests passed.
seed_data_creation: Created test customers and enquiries for CRUD operations via pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 features verified: Feature cards have images without icon overlays, Navbar dynamically loads logo/name from settings, Admin Settings has 'Change Admin Password' section with current/new/confirm fields, Customer Management has search bar and Edit/Reset Password/Delete buttons with modal for updating all fields including password, Account Recovery (/support) only requires phone and problem description, Contact form submissions go to /api/enquiries and appear in Admin Enquiries tab with Mark as Read/Delete functionality.

backend_tests: Settings API returns logo_image field for dynamic navbar logo
Admin can update logo_image in settings
Admin password change endpoint exists and validates current password
Admin can get list of customers with total_bookings count
Admin can reset customer password (returns temporary password)
Support request works with phone and problem only (name/email optional)
New enquiries have 'unread' status by default
Admin can mark enquiry as read
frontend_tests: Feature cards on homepage have images without icon overlays (verified 0 SVG icons per card)
Navbar dynamically displays logo image from settings
Contact form successfully submits to /api/enquiries with success toast
Account Recovery page (/support) only has phone and problem fields (no email/name)
Admin Settings page has 'Change Admin Password' section at bottom
Admin password section has current/new/confirm password fields and change button
Customer Management has search bar at top
Customer Management has Edit, Reset Password, Delete action buttons per row
Edit customer modal shows name/email/phone/password fields
Admin Enquiries tab shows contact form messages with name/email/phone/message
Admin can mark enquiry as read and delete

features_verified.feature_cards_no_icons: PASS - 4 cards with images, 0 SVG icons per card
features_verified.dynamic_navbar_logo: PASS - Logo and parlour name load from settings API
features_verified.admin_password_change: PASS - Section with current/new/confirm fields + button
features_verified.customer_search: PASS - Search bar filters by name/email/phone
features_verified.customer_delete: PASS - Removes customer and their appointments
features_verified.account_recovery_phone_only: PASS - Only phone and problem fields required
features_verified.enquiries_admin_tab: PASS - Shows all enquiries with unread count
